summary: Unit tests for OllamaClient covering happy path, error mapping (404→pull hint, connection refused→serve hint), empty choices, invalid JSON, and context timeout

observations.text: All HTTP tests use httptest.NewServer — no real Ollama instance required; connection-refused tests use localhost:1 to force immediate failure
TestOllamaClient_NoAuthHeader explicitly asserts no Authorization header is sent — documents the intentional absence of auth for local Ollama
